description_long: This is a wooden shelving unit composed of five horizontal planks supported by vertical side beams, creating four open shelves. The wood has a light, natural finish with visible grain patterns and subtle knots, giving it a rustic yet clean appearance. The shelves are evenly spaced and lack any backing or side panels, making the structure open and accessible from the front and sides. The construction appears sturdy, with thick planks and robust joints, suitable for holding various items such as books, tools, or decorative objects. There are no visible doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its function as an open storage or display unit. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, making it suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings.
description: A sturdy, open wooden shelving unit with five horizontal planks and a natural wood grain finish. It features four spacious shelves and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the planks and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the open structure and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the shelf depth and plank thickness.
